title: Infinite Inventory Mod
description: This mod provides a secondary inventory that allows the storing of any item in any quantity, while leaving the vanilla inventory intact. Allows sorting by most recently transferred, quantity and alphabetically. Works with Shulker Box content viewing mods.
body:
# Infinite Inventory Mod
Infinite Inventory mod provides a secondary inventory that allows the storing of any item in any quantity, while leaving the vanilla inventory intact. Works with Shulker Box content viewing mods.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b405d602abdb1dbd7fc85e72e585f2a12d1f0e.png)
# Controls
- SHIFT CLICK on an item in the vanilla inventory to transfer it to the overlay on the right
- CLICK on an item from the overlay to transfer an entire stack to your inventory
- Use the search box to find a desired item
- Use the button next to the search box to sort the list by most recent, by quantity or alphabetically
- Use the tooltips button to toggle extra information about each item. Works with advanced tooltips (F3 + H) and shulker box content viewing mods
